MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,147.00 FILED BY DENG, JENNY DBA MOONRISE DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT BAUXMONT FLYNN DESIGN GROUP FLYNN, CRAYTON BAUXMONT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
